commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Build See the notes Matthew xxiii. 29. (Witham)

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: at all events, are ever unclean, eternally dyed with the blood of the prophets, and of the Lord Himself; and on that account, as being hereditary culprits from their privity to their fathers' crimes,
